checks.description: When a constant frequency value (freq) is applied, the output wave_out must toggle after at most freq+1 clock cycles.
notes: Derived from the specification that count increments each clk and toggles when count reaches (freq-1).
Conservative bound adds one extra cycle to accommodate possible off‑by‑one in implementation.
checks.pass_condition: Within the bounded observation window, a change in wave_out (0→1 or 1→0) is observed; absence of toggle within the window fails the check.
checks.trigger_condition: When freq is driven to a concrete constant and wave_out is observed.

checks.description: wave_out must not toggle more frequently than once every freq clock cycles.
notes: Ensures the implementation respects the minimum period implied by the frequency control.
Applicable for all concrete freq values exercised in the edge case.
checks.pass_condition: The interval (in clock cycles) between successive toggles of wave_out is always greater than or equal to the current freq value.
checks.trigger_condition: Whenever wave_out changes state while freq is held constant.
